commands.cmd:
if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  raw=$(apt-get -s upgrade 2>/dev/null) \
    || { echo "apt-get -s upgrade failed" >&2; exit 1; }
  count=$(printf '%s\n' "$raw" | grep -c '^Inst' || true)
elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  raw=$(dnf check-update -q 2>/dev/null); rc=$?
  [ $rc -eq 0 ] || [ $rc -eq 100 ] \
    || { echo "dnf check-update failed (rc=$rc)" >&2; exit 1; }
  count=$(printf '%s\n' "$raw" | grep -c '^[a-zA-Z0-9]' || true)
else
  echo "no package manager (apt-get/dnf) found" >&2
  exit 1
fi
printf '{"pending":%d}' "$count"
